_readme: Path-flow artifact targeting core admin create_organization (leaf), reached via POST /v2/organizations route wrapper.

flows.description: V2 organization create route to core create_organization function

chain.source:
pub async fn organization_create(
    state: web::Data<AppState>,
    req: HttpRequest,
    json_payload: web::Json<admin::OrganizationCreateRequest>,
) -> HttpResponse {
    let flow = Flow::OrganizationCreate;
    Box::pin(api::server_wrap(
        flow,
        state,
        &req,
        json_payload.into_inner(),
        |state, _, req, _| create_organization(state, req),
        &auth::V2AdminApiAuth,
        api_locking::LockAction::NotApplicable,
    ))
    .await
}
